1995October 27, 1995

🇫🇷 Grenoble, France

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Grenoble, France, October 27, 1995 -- November 6, 1995

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1995-10-grenoble-france

15 Resolutions

256Plenary
Thank Brad Smith for his twelve years of service
SC 4 wishes to warmly and enthusiastically thank Brad Smith for his twelve years of service to SC 4 and for his personal contribution to our continuing success.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
255Plenary
Thank the French National Body for hosting the meetings
SC 4 thanks the French National Body for hosting the meetings of SC 4 and its Working Groups on this occasion and wishes particularly to thank the staff of AFNOR, Sylvie Arbouy, Veronique Auger, an...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
254Plenary
Establish Category A liaison with ISO/TC 8
SC 4 expresses its desire to establish a Category A liaison with ISO/TC 8 on Ships and Marine Technology and appoints Zabi Bazari (Lloyd Register of Shipping) as that liaison.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
253Plenary
Register ISO 10303-22 as a Draft International Standard
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to register the current ISO 10303-22 document as a Draft International Standard.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
252Plenary
Accept report of Policy and Planning Committee
SC 4 accepts the report of its Policy and Planning Committee.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
251Plenary
Appoint Shaun Devlin as Convener of JWG 9
SC 4 appoints Shaun Devlin as Convener of JWG 9.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
250Plenary
Disband Project Management Advisory Group
SC 4 disbands its Project Management Advisory Group.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
249Plenary
Disband Strategic Planning Advisory Group
SC 4 disbands its Strategic Planning Advisory Group.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
248Plenary
Require AIC drafts to incorporate agreed technical changes
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to ensure that if any AIC drafts are recommended for promotion to DIS under current ballot (N315-N332, Parts 501-518) the parts will incorporate agreed changes in resp...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
247Plenary
Cancel project 10303-25 for FORTRAN language binding
SC 4 agrees to cancel project # 4, 10303-25: FORTRAN Language Binding to the SDAI, due to lack of activity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
246Plenary
Cancel project 10303-103 for electrical connectivity
SC 4 agrees to cancel project #24, 10303-103: Electrical/Electronics Connectivity, due to lack of activity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
245Plenary
Adopt Technical Corrigendum to ISO 10303-21
SC 4 adopts the Technical Corrigendum to ISO 10303-21 dated 7 September 1995 and directs the SC 4 Secretariat to forward the document to ISO Geneva.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
244Plenary
Endorse Richard R. Wandmacher as SC 4 Chairman
SC 4 endorses the Secretariat's nomination of Richard R. Wandmacher to fill the position as Chairman of SC 4 for a term of six years and requests the Secretariat to forward the nomination to AFNOR ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 thanks Jean-Pierre Letouzey for his service as Convener of the Strategic Planning Advisory Group.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 thanks Neal Laurance for his service as Convener of the Project Management Advisory Group.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
